title: fornicium carthamoides subsp. orientale
intro: Fornicium carthamoides subsp. orientale is a plant species, also known as the Oriental false chamomile, belonging to the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Fornicium carthamoides subsp. orientale include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and act as a natural sleep aid. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
